title: Compensation & Benefits Executive
description:
• Compliance with all relevant laws and regulations
  • Maintenance of organization's human resources by planning, implementing, and evaluating employee relations and human resources policies, programs, and practices for example; Outsourcing of Payroll Vendor Implenmentation
  • Ensure employee data in Workday is accurate for monthly payroll process
  • Ensure accurate payroll records and employee data in HRIS and Payroll system
  • Update payroll on new hires, terminations, and changes in pay rates
  • Reporting and filings related to compensation and benefits.
  • Take on full spectrum of Compensation & Benefit (Insurance renewal, insurance & medical claims, payment matters, variable bonus, Annual Performance Appraisal and Merit Increment etc.)
  • Supporting and maintain salary structures and job classifications for hourly employees.
  • Perform regular market analysis to ensure competitive pay practices where necessary
  • Carry out salary surveys and analyze data to recommend adjustments.
  • Design and manage employee benefits programs, including employee health insurance
  • Review and negotiate with benefits providers to ensure cost-effective and comprehensive coverage.
  • Provide guidance and support to employees regarding compensation and benefits inquiries and administration of employee benefits
  • Design and update compensation and benefits policies and procedures.
  • Effective communication and consistent application of policies across the organization
  • Take part in information security audits and adherence matters

Requirements

  • Possess at least a Degree Human Resource Management or relevant subjects
  • 6-10 years HR related working experience
  • Microsoft skills (Excel, PowerPoint etc.)
  • Good communications skills and excellent team player
  • Analytical, Meticulous and Diligent
  • Ability to deal with personal and confidential matters with upmost discretion.
  • Able to thrive in a dynamic and fast paced environment
  • Verse with Employment Act, and Labour Legislations


Kindly understand that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


WeLead Solutions Pte Ltd

Reg. No: R2197713

EA License No.: 23C1882

postedCompany.description:
In today’s rapidly evolving business landscape, finding the right talent is crucial for success. At WeLead Solutions, we specialize in connecting top-tier candidates with leading companies across the engineering, healthcare, IT, and manufacturing sectors. 


Our mission is to bridge the gap between exceptional talent and the organizations that need them, ensuring a perfect fit that drives innovation, productivity, and growth.


With a deep understanding of the unique challenges and demands of each industry, our expert team leverages a comprehensive approach to recruitment. We combine cutting-edge technology with personalized service to identify and engage the best candidates in the market. Whether you are looking for skilled engineers, compassionate healthcare professionals, innovative IT specialists, or experienced manufacturing personnel, we are dedicated to delivering tailored talent solutions that align with your strategic goals.


At WeLead Solutions, we believe that people are the heart of every successful organization. Our commitment to excellence means we take the time to understand not only the technical skills required but also the cultural fit that will contribute to a thriving workplace. Partner with us to unlock the potential of your workforce and drive your business forward with confidence.


Let us help you build the team that will shape the future of your industry. Discover the difference of working with a recruitment agency that truly understands your needs—experience the WeLead advantage today! Your Growth is our DNA!
